p.s. the recent developments in japan's diplomatic relationships with south korea and china show a strong network inside the region. compared to two decades ago, the money flow has increased significantly. the travel between the two countries has also become more frequent. the historical relations were more limited and less connected. the current situation reflects a more open and cooperative network.  

p.s. one can see the impact of the network on the money flow and travel between the countries. one can also see the changes in the network over time. one can see the effects of the money and travel on the relationships. one can see the changes in the network and the money flow. one can see the impact of the network and the money on the travel.
